title: The Edge of Human
overview: Inspired by the classic movie Blade Runner and the book Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?  Jeter is an android hunter who is investigating a moon bus hijacking that crashed near the coast of Macau.  But when he becomes friends with a female android Marie he starts to second guess his job.
